executives.name: Alex Heath
executives.background: Mr. Heath has over 15 years of experience in the financial services and mining industries. He previously served as President and CEO of Ethos Gold Corp. (now Prospector Metals). He has also worked in investment banking with a focus on the mining sector.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Corporate Development & Interim CFO

executives.name: Kris Raffle
executives.background: Mr. Raffle is a Professional Geologist and a Principal of APEX Geoscience Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in mineral exploration and project management.

executives.name: Michelle Tanguay
executives.background: Ms. Tanguay has over 25 years of experience in environmental management and regulatory affairs in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Kris Raffle
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Raffle is a Professional Geologist and a Principal of APEX Geoscience Ltd. He has over 20 years of experience in mineral exploration and project management.
